penalties.description: The marked circle was not completely cut out. No cutting action was observed.

reasoning: Both models agreed that the marked circle was not completely cut out, but disagreed on whether any cutting action occurred. Claude reported no cutting action at all (0 seconds), while GPT reported 240 seconds of activity. Given the shared observation that only manipulation/positioning occurred without visible cutting instruments or cutting action, the task was never properly initiated beyond setup, resulting in zero completion time and zero score.
